topStories.title: Cuban protesters ransack Communist office as energy crisis deepens
topStories.description: Discontent is mounting over rolling blackouts and shortages of food, fuel and medicine, exacerbated by a US blockade.

topStories.title: Congress Releases Second List Of 23 Candidates For Assam Polls
topStories.description: The Congress on Saturday released its second list of 23 party candidates for the upcoming Assam assembly elections. It has also left 15 seats for its alliance partners in the northeastern state, where...

topStories.title: 'Just A Joke': Iran Envoy On Ukraine's Support To US Against Shahed Drones
topStories.description: Iran's envoy to Ukraine, Shahriar Amouzegar, dismissed the support Kyiv has offered to the United States and its Gulf allies, as Ukraine advertises its expertise in destroying Iranian-designed drones...

topStories.title: New York City detects first known case of severe Mpox strain, health department issues advisory – all you need to know
topStories.description: Mpox is an infectious disease that can cause symptoms such as a painful rash, swollen lymph nodes, fever, headache, muscle aches, back pain and fatigue. The first known case of a more severe strain of Mpox, known as Mpox clade I, was detected in New York City on Saturday

topStories.description: The Trump ally's departure comes as the centre  prepares to shut down for a two-year renovation.

topStories.title: Trump warns Iran again over closure of Strait of Hormuz — ‘US will be bombing the hell out of shoreline’
topStories.description: Donald Trump has warned that the US “will be bombing the h*ll out of the shoreline” at the Strait of Hormuz in Iran. He also expressed hope that other countries would also send their war ships to the area.

dailyNews.description: The remarks come after Pete Hegseth said on Friday (March 13) that Iran’s new Supreme Leader was “wounded and likely disfigured.”

dailyNews.title: Inside Trump-Putin call - US rejected proposal to move Iran's enriched uranium to Russia to end conflict: Report
dailyNews.description: Russia had reportedly floated similar proposals during US-Iran nuclear negotiations last May, before the US and Israel attacked Iran's nuclear facilities in June, as well as in the weeks leading up to the current conflict

dailyNews.title: Why has the US targeted Iran's Kharg Island?
dailyNews.description: The tiny island is home to one of the most critical pieces of Iran's energy infrastructure.

dailyNews.title: Hamas urges key ally Iran to halt attacks on Gulf states
dailyNews.description: The Palestinian group also affirms Tehran's right to defend itself from "aggression" by the US and Israel.

dailyNews.title: More US Marines and warships being moved to Middle East, reports say
dailyNews.description: The reinforcements will come from an amphibious ready group that is usually based in Japan, an official told CBS, the BBC's US partner.

dailyNews.title: Cigarette smoking in America plummets to historic single-digit low, new study finds
dailyNews.description: US adult smoking rates hit historic low of 9.9% in 2024, marking the first time cigarette use dropped to single digits, but 25.2 million Americans still smoke.

dailyNews.title: Zach Braff shuts down rumors he has an AI chatbot girlfriend: 'Please update all gossip sites'
dailyNews.description: Zach Braff denies dating AI chatbot girlfriend rumors on Instagram stories, calling claims false and asking gossip sites to update their coverage.

dailyNews.title: WNBA faces critical deadline as ongoing collective bargaining talks threaten to disrupt schedule, commish says
dailyNews.description: WNBA Commissioner Cathy Engelbert and union Executive Director Terri Carmichael Jackson reported progress in contract talks but cautioned a deadline needs to be reached soon.

dailyNews.title: Protesters torch Communist Party HQ in Cuba as video appears to capture gunfire
dailyNews.description: Dramatic footage appears to show protester on the ground after alleged gunfire as crowds attack Communist Party building in Cuba, chanting 'Freedom!' amid crisis.

dailyNews.title: Some Iranian soccer players granted asylum by Australia chose to return home, local official says
dailyNews.description: Three Iranian women's soccer players granted asylum in Australia are returning to Iran despite threats, according to former player Tina Kordrostami, who says families face intimidation.

dailyNews.title: Trump-backed Potomac sewage cleanup complete after massive spill ahead of summer America250 celebrations
dailyNews.description: Potomac River sewage spill repairs have been completed after President Donald Trump approved a federal disaster declaration allowing FEMA assistance.

dailyNews.title: Chappell Roan turns heads with bold see-through look at Paris Fashion Week: PHOTOS
dailyNews.description: Chappell Roan turned heads in daring sheer black gown at Paris Fashion Week, joining stars like Zendaya and Jessica Chastain in bold fashion trends at the industry event.

topStories.description: The $5 billion project in the Gulf of Mexico is expected to help produce up to 10 billion barrels of oil by the end of this decade. Critics say it could endanger people and marine life.

dailyNews.description: Josh Nass had recently represented Joseph Schwartz, a former nursing home executive who was convicted of tax crimes before being freed by the president late last year.

dailyNews.title: Justice Dept. Legal Threat Complicates Trump’s Pick for Fed Chair
dailyNews.description: An investigation of the Federal Reserve was thwarted on Friday, but a department appeal could reimpose an obstacle in Kevin Warsh’s path.

dailyNews.title: How Trump Officials Embraced an Animal Rights Campaign
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is curbing animal experiments in response to shifts in public opinion, technological advances, years of animal rights advocacy and the work of a conservative activist.

dailyNews.title: ‘This Spells Real Trouble for Republicans’
dailyNews.description: The Republican pollster Kristen Soltis Anderson joins E.J. Dionne Jr. and Robert Siegel to discuss Trump’s falling approval rating and what it portends for November.

dailyNews.title: Tehran threatens to retaliate after U.S. attacks vital Iranian oil hub
dailyNews.description: President Trump's comments came shortly after he said that the U.S. military had conducted "one of the most power bombing raids" on a vital Iranian oil hub.

dailyNews.title: FCC chair threatens broadcast licenses as Trump criticizes Iran war coverage
dailyNews.description: Federal Communications Commission Chair Brendan Carr did not name specific networks, but his post included a reference to a Saturday morning Truth Social post from the president.

dailyNews.title: Trump thanks TSA agents working with no pay amid government shutdown
dailyNews.description: TSA officers faced their first full missed paycheck Friday.

dailyNews.title: Breaking down the U.S. strikes on Kharg Island
dailyNews.description: President Trump's announcement about strikes on Kharg Island has sparked more questions about the potential of U.S. military boots on the ground.

dailyNews.title: Judge blocks Trump administration's subpoenas against Fed Chair Powell
dailyNews.description: A federal judge blocked two grand jury subpoenas against Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell on Friday. Chief Judge James Boasberg wrote that "the Government has offered no evidence whatsoever that Powell committed any crime other than displeasing the President."

dailyNews.title: U.S. strikes key Iranian oil hub
dailyNews.description: President Trump said Friday night on social media that the U.S. struck a key Iranian oil hub on Kharg Island as tensions over the global oil supply ramp up amid Iran's closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Iran threatens to retaliate against neighbors; Trump urges countries to assist in securing Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump said in a Truth Social post that he directed U.S. Central Command to execute a bombing raid that "obliterated" military targets on Kharg Island.

dailyNews.title: FCC chair slams broadcasters after Trump disputes reports on Iran-damaged U.S. tankers
dailyNews.description: FCC Chair Brendan Carr blasted broadcasters shortly after President Donald Trump called reports that Iran struck five U.S. tanker planes "fake news."

dailyNews.title: Trump says he thinks Putin is helping Iran
dailyNews.description: Russian leaders told President Trump they aren't sharing intelligence with Iran as it fights the U.S. and Israel, special envoy Steve Witkoff said this week.
